set security zones security-zone dmz address-book address web-host-specific 10.1.1.5/32
set applications application-set web-services application app-http
set applications application-set web-services application app-https
set security policies from-zone untrust to-zone dmz policy narrow-to-web-host match source-address any
set security policies from-zone untrust to-zone dmz policy narrow-to-web-host match destination-address web-host-specific
set security policies from-zone untrust to-zone dmz policy narrow-to-web-host match application web-services
set security policies from-zone untrust to-zone dmz policy narrow-to-web-host then permit
